map.notes: Canonical topic identity is resolved via anchor-to-topic resolution and registry-backed lookup; legacy/compat anchors are normalized through anchor resolution rules.
map.tests_gates: Anchor resolution + session-validator legality checks and anchor/mode compatibility guards.

map.notes: Questions are registry-backed and read through runtime session creation/import paths; API normalizes canonical shape for clients.
map.tests_gates: Registry lookup and creation/import validation paths, API schema shape constraints.

map.notes: Family/type truth is registry-derived; released-scope checks rely on released type/family references.
map.tests_gates: Canonical type checks and release gate conditions in scope contracts.

map.notes: Session runtime is canonical in service layer, with API responses normalized for canonical bundle/session state.
map.tests_gates: Session API validation + runtime contract mode/anchor checks.

map.notes: Attempt processing is event-driven with explicit stage ordering and attempt event builders.
map.tests_gates: Event contract ordinals + event service transition checks.

map.topic: Workspace (Paper Workspace + Topic Sections + Stable Slots)
map.notes: Workspace projection/state is owned by workspace read services and surfaced to runtime pages; paper/workspace compatibility appears through explicit adapters.
map.tests_gates: Stable slot read paths and workspace projection calls.

map.notes: Artifact lifecycle is explicit and intent-based in service code; payloads are carried in session context and task adapters.
map.tests_gates: Artifact lifecycle + transition constants and capability checks in artifact service.

map.notes: Review task lifecycle and repository operations are runtime-owned; queue is consumed by topic/review pages.
map.tests_gates: State transition assertions in review task service and repository write guards.

map.notes: Provenance and trust-tier fields are constructed/validated in evidence service/contracts and threaded into ask context.
map.tests_gates: Evidence context contract + validator coverage at context builder input boundaries.

map.notes: No single explicit Mastery object file was identified in this pass; learning effect appears derived from attempt/event outcomes and session context.
map.tests_gates: Attempt/event pipeline event ordinals and effect propagation to session context.

map.notes: Marking result contract includes conservative/non-authoritative branching; authoritative marks require scoped release and posture guards.
map.tests_gates: Released scope checks + marking result contract and non-authoritative fallback markers.

map.notes: Central canonical object for session scope; runtime validates and persists typed refs rather than replacing with raw IDs.
map.tests_gates: Contract invariants and runtime validation before persistence.

map.notes: Explicit release checks and non-released fallback paths are enforced to prevent fake authoritative scores or judgments.
map.tests_gates: release_scope and authority-posture checks in runtime contracts and marking service.
